notes: Mapping is comprehensive and accurate. All quest IDs (CONTACT, A_TAIL_OF_TWO_CATS) are actively progressed, not merely mentioned. Items list covers all major pre-requirements: teleportation items (ring of dueling, camulet), prayer/combat support (prayer potion, swordfish), utility (waterskins, antipoison, bullseye lantern), and quest-specific gear (catspeak amulet, keris). Unresolved items appropriately flagged: air/fire runes marked for flexibility (or staff), golden pyramid correctly noted as obtained mid-step rather than brought. Abstract 'cash stack' is appropriate generalization with clarifying 30k gp note. No ID errors, wrong tiers, or missing critical items detected.
